finding_results.notes: Reframed Melie's backstory and Jin's outside memory to make Reva's abandonment a two-year wound dating to when Melie was four. Anchored Fasa's questioning to the existing three-month public death story so the naming now cracks an established lie instead of introducing a conflicting date.
finding_results.summary: The chapter now presents one coherent chronology: Reva left when Melie was four, Jin's death story is a three-month-old public lie, and the interrogation exposes that lie without breaking canon.

summary: Revised chapter_10 to resolve the Reva timeline continuity break by separating Jin's two-year private abandonment history from his three-month public death lie and aligning Fasa's interrogation to that established cover story.
